sections_cited: Section 134-A of the Income Tax Ordinance
Section 47A of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 125 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos. 11, 25 & 26 2. For orders on CMA No.1613/2025 3. For hearing of main case 22.04.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel since Section 134-A of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 has already been amended having a conclusion effect of Section 47A of the Sales Tax Act, 1990, therefore, this reference appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
